title: tectaria borneensis
intro: Tectaria borneensis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Borneo. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation, due to the presence of sesquiterpenoid compounds and flavonoids in its leaves. The health benefits of Tectaria borneensis include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against infections and oxidative stress. Tinctures, infusions, and extracts of the plant are commonly used in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
